zh.lifeSummary: 當Eon de Blaison Lord of Blaison於1025年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易布萊頌時，他的父親Thibaud II de Blaison25歲，母親Matilda DE CARINTHIE25歲。他於1050年與Tcheletis of Trier結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1086年在他的家鄉享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Eon de Blaison Lord of Blaison was born in 1025, in Blaison, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Thibaud II de Blaison, was 25 and his mother, Matilda DE CARINTHIE, was 25. He married Tcheletis of Trier in 1050. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1086, in his hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eon de Blaison Lord of Blaison est né en 1025, à Blaison, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Thibaud II de Blaison, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda DE CARINTHIE, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Tcheletis of Trier en 1050. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1086, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

Er hat 1050 Tcheletis of Trier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1086 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.lifeSummary: Eon de Blaison Lord of Blaison(이)가 1025년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 블레이슨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thibaud II de Blaison(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda DE CARINTHIE(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1050년 Tcheletis of Trier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1086년 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eon de Blaison Lord of Blaison родился в 1025 г. в местности блеисон, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Thibaud II de Blaison было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda DE CARINTHIE, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Tcheletis of Trier в 1050 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1086 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год.
